message:
fix(capacity): convert silent eviction to explicit rejection at capacity limits

Replace push_bounded() silent eviction with fail-closed error returns
across three capacity-sensitive subsystems:

artifact_contract.rs:
- Remove push_bounded() helper entirely
- Add AdmissionConfigError::TrustedSignerCapacityExceeded variant
- Change with_signer() to return Result<(), AdmissionConfigError>
- Reject additions when trusted signer count >= MAX_TRUSTED_SIGNERS (4096)

network_guard.rs:
- Change add_rule() to return Result<(), GuardError>
- Reject egress rule additions at MAX_RULES capacity
- Enforce invariant: deny rules are NEVER evicted (safety critical)
- Update all test fixtures to handle Result returns

compat_gates.rs:
- Add preemptive capacity check before compilation: reject if scope
  predicates >= MAX_ENTRIES instead of silently dropping
- Replace push_bounded with direct push after capacity validation
- Add test: add_policy_predicate_rejects_overflow_without_eviction()

ssrf_policy.rs:
- Wrap add_rule() calls with let _ = to suppress expected capacity
  errors in allowlist enforcement templates

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
